narrativeFunction: Establish the central question — will Marcus re-enter the world he left — while building Elena as a credible catalyst. By chapter end, Marcus has agreed to one meeting, and the reader understands the cost.
dominantRegister: Restrained, blue-collar precision. Sensory-heavy. Conversations carry more weight in what's unsaid.
pacingTarget: Slow burn across four scenes. Each scene raises the stakes incrementally. Scene 3 is the fulcrum — the tempo shifts there.
endingPosture: Marcus walking into something he said he'd never do again. The last image is physical — a door, a step, a threshold.

wrongAbout: They'll assume this is a simple noir setup

knows: Marcus has a violent past he left
Marcus has agreed to one meeting
suspects: Marcus still has the capacity for violence
Elena is more desperate than she lets on
activeTensions: Why does Marcus care about Dex?
